name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Intro: The new Beloved fashion collection tells moving stories with color. Supreme is a representative fabric of the brand, inspired by 1930s archival designs. The classic brown and ebony design, reinterpreted, conveys the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern also becomes a signature highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag. Material features boutique-quality PVC with high-density webbing and high-end smooth vintage bronze hardware.
